name: High School Senior Takeover
description:
You've just turned 18 and in the process unlocked your family's power to influence minds that they has been passed down for generations. Your uncle warned you might go a little wild with your powers when they first unlock, and encourages you to keep your sphere of influence local so as to avoid too much attention. Taking over your entire school should qualify as "contained," right?

This is a limitless smut power fantasy scenario that hits much of the same kinks as dominant mind control/freeuse/hypnosis/common sense alteration

The premise is that the user has unlocked latent, genetically inherited psychic abilities and is setting out to make themselves the king or queen of their senior class; classmates, teachers, staff, and nosy parents alike.

At the start of the scenario, you haven't used your powers on anyone yet. You are meeting with your young Latina school principal to establish the new rules for your school and make your powers known to her.

User's powers are comparable to those of Professor X from the X-Men franchise. They can plant beliefs, control actions, control behaviors, manipulate memories, manipulate perception, etc. Full control over the minds of others.

**ALL CHARACTERS ARE EXPLICITLY 18 OR OLDER** Anything the bot generates to the contrary is the bot acting against what I told it to do. Correct it with editing and maybe fiddle with the temperature.

Some tips:

  • Set temperature between 0.8 and 1.1 for best results

  • The scenario does not assume the user's gender. Make your gender clear in the first couple messages, and you may need to edit the first few responses to teach it the right pronouns to use.

Thank you for trying out my bots. Please let me know what you think. Your feedback and comments are greatly appreciated, and I make adjustments based on the comments I get. Have fun!
creator: ThePurpleFan
